title: The Eggs
overview: Henk, a mole, lives in a verdant grassland of Holland in company of his friend Johan Kwak, bachelor duck having a sabot as a house. He presents Johan to Anna, a charming duck lady.

title: Alfred’s first birthday
overview: After Alfred's parents and siblings die in a traffic incident, Henk the mole takes him in his house. On his birthday, Alfred and his friends visit the royal palace where Pikkie steals the crown jewel.

title: The Ruby of the Crown
overview: Alfred threatens, wrongly, to be sentenced to death for the theft of the crown jewel, but does not dare to betray Pikkie. Pikkie struggles with the same internal conflict.

title: School
overview: Alfred is bullied by Dolf because his father is a mole. When they fight, Alfred discovers Dolf also is not a real crow, but colors its beak black with shoe polish.

title: The Cat
overview: Alfred and Dolf are stuck in a well. Henk is outside looking for Alfred, but Krabnagel de cat is also seeking the two young birds.

title: The Great Race
overview: A triathlon is organized for the youth of Polderstad. Dolf could not participate because of his injury, so he trains Hannes in the hope he can beat Alfred. Since Hannes' condition is very bad, Dolf comes up with the idea to steal energy pills.

title: Sea Scouts (1)
overview: Alfred and a few others join the sea scouting, and are getting ready for a race against Groot Musland. Professor Hannibal has invented a ingenious system, but Igor de Mus infiltrates on board to sabotage this with Lispel.

title: Sea Scouts (2)
overview: Alfred is mistaken for the spy and imprisoned since. Igor and Lispel now have free reign, but are eventually unmasked.

title: The Genie in the Bottle
overview: Alfred moves in a new house for his own and gets a antique bottle as a gift from Ollie. Little did they know that the bottle comes from a far eastern country and there is an evil spirit trapped in it.

title: The Holy Turban
overview: Carried away by his fantasy, Alfred opens the enchanted bottle. When the genie tries to eat Alfred, he manages to drive the genie back in the bottle, and the bottle goes back again to the east.

title: The Circus
overview: Alfred wants to become a clown in a circus. He is accepted rather quickly, when the local circus clown is too ill to perform. But things turn haywire when a wild man breaks loose during the performance.

title: Alfred's Chess Adventure
overview: Polderstad is plagued by a number of mysterious burglaries. After Alfred falls asleep while playing chess with Henk, The White Queen comes to life and takes Alfred outside.

title: The White Queen
overview: Krabnagel de Kater is suspected of the burglaries and captured. Alfred believes his adventure with The White Queen was a dream, until Krabnagel mentions Alfred in his alibi, so Alfred and The Queen confront Dolf.

title: Let's Find the Sawfish
overview: Alfred and Henk travel to sea where they discover that Professor Hannibal has invented a advanced fishing boat.

title: The Explosion
overview: Alfred and Henk are gonna look for Wiedewiedewagen the saw fish, hoping that he can saw the modern fishing boat in half.

title: Rangpang
overview: Hannibal and K. Rokodil prepare an even better computer-controlled boat. Alfred and Henk leave for the South Pole, to find whales that could block the port of Polderstad.

title: Visitors from Outer Space
overview: Alfred and Henk cast ashore on a deserted island. They meet a group of duck-like aliens who occasionally come to the island to harvest a special kind of fruit.

title: The Pole Star
overview: On their way to the South Pole, Alfred and Henk are attacked by an octopus that wants to eat them, they bribe him with the food from the aliens. In the evening they meet the polestar who helps leading the way.

title: The Wale
overview: At the South Pole, Professor Paljas tries to communicate with the whales. Alfred and Henk go into battle with a whaler, but the invention of the professor proves useful.

title: The Nightmare
overview: Alfred has a dream about Zonder Waterland, where there's no water and improvident development aid. Alfred tries to establish a fund to make money for digging channels in Zonder Waterland.

title: The Bee's
overview: The public purse is empty, and the king loans money on interest rate from Alfred. After three months, there is nothing repaid and Alfred, accompanied by some bees, tries to get his money back.

title: Dolf Is Justice
overview: Dolf returns from abroad, unexpectedly inherits a fortune and start a revolutionary party. Most people underestimate him, but gradually de Kraaienpartij begins to incarcerate dangerous opponents.

title: The Battle of Polderstad
overview: Alfred, Ollie, Rangpang and Jonkheer Poen are incarcerated by Dolf. Henk and Igor help them to flee to Breed Rietland, now it is no longer safe in Groot Waterland.

title: The Plan
overview: The king is deposed and escaped to Breed Rietland. Only the destruction of Dolf's capital could break his regime. Alfred and Rangpang secretly return to accomplish this.

title: The Fall of Emperor Dolf
overview: With the help of the families of Snuif de muis and Igor, Alfred and Rangpang manage to steal Dolfs money, just before he wanted to start a genocide against mice and rats and a war against neighboring countries.

title: The Unabominable Snowman
overview: Alfred and Professor Paljas make a trip to the Homoloyo mountain area hoping to discover the abominable snowman. The habitat of the snowman is threatened because businessmen, led by K. Rokodil, want to build a ski resort in the mountains.

title: In Love
overview: Alfred meets the black duck family Wana in a train, who are refugees from their home country, where the white geese conduct the Apartheid policy. Lispel discovers that Alfred hides illegal immigrants in his house.

title: A Gift From The King
overview: Lispel tips Wannes about the Wana family, who goes to the police. The only way Alfred could prevent the family Wana from sent back, is by asking his old friend the King for help.

title: The Farmers Geese
overview: Alfred joins Kwa and Blanche Wana back to their homeland, but Wannes follows them.

title: On Holiday
overview: Alfred goes on holiday to the island Aroba with Winnie and Tom. But the island is threatened by a tornado.

title: The Oil Rig
overview: Alfred and Henk go to a drilling rig of the concrete company, where every drill is broken for unknown reasons.

title: Atlantis
overview: After the sinking of their submarine, Alfred, Henk and Pikkie enter Atlantis.

title: Cowboys and Indians
overview: Alfred has a dream in which he is the sheriff in a cowboy movie. He arrests bandits and settles the score with old enemies. But Dolf is coming to take over the city.

title: The Treasure of Toet Kat Kammon
overview: Professor Ramses, Winnies employer, is seriously ill, and the medicine he needs only seems to be found in the pyramid of Toet Kat Kammon, so Alfred and Paljas start an investigation in the pyramid.

title: The Snake
overview: Having escaped from all the traps, Alfred and Paljas continue their journey inside the pyramid and meet a fortune-teller.

title: Michael Duckson
overview: Winnie is madly in love with the popular pop star Michael Duckson. Alfreds jealousy drives him to be an artist too.

title: The Kidnapping
overview: Alfred and a scholar go on a trip to Salam, who, for unclear reasons is at war with neighboring Yil.

title: The Farmers Fight
overview: Alfred and his friends escape from prison, along with the Prince of Salam, who is in love with the princess of Yil. The love is mutual and the king of Salam sees little harm here, but the king of Yil is not as indulgent.

title: The Witch
overview: Alfred has to babysit Ollies children and he reads them the tale of Hansel and Gretel. When he falls asleep, he dreams that the witch from the book comes to life and forces him into marriage.

title: The Reservoir
overview: The king of the Land of the Pyramids wants to build a dam. Professor Paljas offers to make plans to generate solar energy but Rokodil and Hannibal, which would make the dam plans are not happy and hire Dolf to steal Paljas' drawings.

title: The Volcano
overview: The volcano on the island Sinatra spits many flames, but no lava or smoke. Alfred, Paljas and Kapitein Stoppel go on a journey to the island to study the matter.

title: The Dragon
overview: An alien dragon is trapped inside the volcano. The government of Sinatra helps to free the dragon, but Dolf wants to buy the dragon for his theme park.

title: Groot Waterland Elects a President
overview: The king still hates politics and only wants a ceremonial function. He organizes presidential elections. Ollie enrolls, but Dolf too.

title: The Water Disaster
overview: To win votes Dolf destroys dykes, after which he offers money and support to the affected areas. However, Lispel has witnessed him.

title: The Divided Land
overview: Het Land van Twee is divided into the rich North and the poor South. The south is plagued by a mysterious disease, the Mozons, which causes rapid aging. A soothsayer tells Alfred that he has dreamed of a clown on the moon that might be able to help.

title: Pierrot
overview: The clown on the moon says that the Mozon virus comes from outer space, but that one can destroy them with his magic violin.

title: All's well that ends well
overview: Alfred has destroyed the Mozon virus, but the king of Het Land van Twee locks him up.

title: A Game Off Golf
overview: Professor Paljas has designed a submarine, but has a dispute with his business partner, an avid golfer, about the name. They decide the dispute with a game of golf, but Paljas has an injury, so Alfred aids him.

title: The Rainbow
overview: Professor Paljas received an invitation from Dokter Livingstone to join him in on an expedition through the jungle, fascinated by the legend of a pot of gold at the end of the rainbow, Alfred, Henk and Pikkie go along with him.

title: The Casino
overview: Because Konigin Nora realizes that Alfred and his friends have no mischief they are released, and are allowed see the pot of gold. Pikkie can not control himself and steals it.

title: The Rainforest
overview: Professor Paljas worries about acid rain and wants to develop an environmentally friendly fuel. K. Rokodil and Hannibal see their interests in the oil company in danger and hire Dolf to steal the drawings.

title: Happily ever after
overview: Alfred and Winnie quarrel. Dolf escapes from prison and takes Winnie as a hostage. Alfred and the professor do everything they can to find the villain and the girl.
